models.label: Caatuu Curriculum and Asset Embeddings
models.source_label: Caatuu curated curriculum corpus and manual image descriptions
models.intended_use: Local curriculum retrieval, duplicate review, game selection, distractor search, and manually described image asset lookup.
models.runtime: SQLite vector database with local hash embedder
notes: This is a deterministic local hash embedding baseline, not a semantic transformer model.
Curriculum metadata is stored in SQLite for filtering and review but is not embedded.
Image asset vectors are computed only from manually written English descriptions.
BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5 remains a planned future semantic embedding replacement.
